modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues with accessing ExamSoft Examplify articles.

full_description_text: 
El usuario estaba intentando acceder a los artículos relacionados con ExamSoft Examplify, pero encontró dificultades. A pesar de seguir los enlaces proporcionados, no pudo obtener la información necesaria. Esto ha causado frustración, ya que la documentación es crucial para el uso efectivo de la plataforma.
